items.title: New and final offseason preview on Third Apron: San Antonio Spurs
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
New and final offseason preview on Third Apron: San Antonio Spurs

They will probably trade De'Aaron Fox at some point. In the meantime, they have plenty of flexibility to improve the rotation while extending Victor Wembanyama and Julian Champagnie.

media.title: Pushing the Spurs Over the Top - 2026 Offseason Preview
media.description: On the Spurs offseason, their vast spending power to significantly improve their rotation, and why a De'Aaron Fox trade will need to come sooner than later.

items.title: NEW: I spoke to a number of sports media executives and soccer on-air talent about the World Cup hydration breaks.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: I spoke to a number of sports media executives and soccer on-air talent about the World Cup hydration breaks. 

Everyone believes they are here to stay. The money is too great for the host broadcasters/FIFA to pass up.

STORY:  cbc.ca/sports/socce...

media.title: ANALYSIS | Media analysts believe FIFA's lucrative hydration breaks are here to stay | CBC Sports
media.description: What was designed as a safety play for players has become a financial bonanza for broadcasters.

The New York Knicks now have the 1st, 3st, and 5th largest comeback wins in NBA Finals history.

In the same Finals.
